steps.title: Use spent with an activity
steps.content: The sentence uses the pattern spent plus a time period plus an activity. After spent 161 days, the verb form should show what activity the lander was doing during that time.

steps.title: Reject wrong verb forms
steps.content: Choice A and Choice D are finite verb phrases that cannot follow spent 161 days in this construction. Choice B is a simple past form, which also does not name the ongoing activity after the time period. The answer is C.
